functions.title: Guide Book #105

§7Guide Book #105§r
§lLearning Books§r
§8ITEMS§r
 
•Learning Book of Villaging
•Learning Book of Book Keeping
•Learning Book of Scrollwright
•Learning Book of Crates Trading

§lLearning Book of Villaging§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lDropped by§r: Book Keeper
•§lTrade by§r: Book Keeper
•§lCraftable§r: NO
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lOffhand equipable§r: YES
•§lCan tempt§r: Custom villager-type mobs.

•Can be used to transform custom villager into §lVillager§r.
•By giving this to a custom villager, their trade table will automatically change and reset.

§lLearning Book of Book Keeping§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lDropped by§r: Book Keeper
•§lTrade by§r: Book Keeper
•§lCraftable§r: NO
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lOffhand equipable§r: YES
•§lCan tempt§r: Custom villager

mobs.
•Can be used to transform custom villager into §lBook Keeper§r.
•By giving this to a custom villager, their trade table will automatically change and reset.

§lLearning Book of Scrollwright§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lDropped by§r: Scrollwright
•§lTrade by§r: Book Keeper
•§lCraftable§r: NO
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lOffhand equipable§r: YES
•§lCan tempt§r: Custom villager

mobs.
•Can be used to transform custom villager into §lScrollwright§r.
•By giving this to a custom villager, their trade table will automatically change and reset.

§lLearning Book of Crates Trading§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lDropped by§r: Crates Trader
•§lTrade by§r: Crates Trader
•§lCraftable§r: NO
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lOffhand equipable§r: YES
•§lCan tempt§r: Custom villager

-type mobs.
•Can be used to transform custom villager into §lCrates Trader§r.
•By giving this to a custom villager, their trade table will automatically change and reset.
•When used on a Crates Trader, it will transform them into
either a Wandering Crates Trader or a Dwelling Crates Trader.
